name: Just the Best Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg and blend in.
4. Mix in the salad oil until well-blended.
5. Gradually add oats, cornflakes, coconut, and nuts; stir until combined.
6. Stir in flour, baking soda, salt, and vanilla extract until a dough forms.
7. Form the dough into balls about the size of a walnut.
8. Place the cookies on an ungreased cookie sheet.
9. Flatten each cookie with a fork dipped in water.
10. Bake for 12 minutes before removing from the oven.
11. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the cooled cookies.
